config_purpose: Estimate-only token pricing for direct-SDK scout usage summaries. This file does not establish Harvard HUIT billing.

gpt-5.4-nano.source_note: Estimate basis only: the official OpenAI GPT-5.4 nano model page listed standard text-token rates of USD 0.20 per 1M input tokens and USD 1.25 per 1M output tokens when checked 2026-07-21. Responses API reasoning_tokens is treated as a detail within output_tokens and is not added a second time. Harvard HUIT contract/proxy pricing, cached-input treatment, hosted web-search/tool fees, taxes, credits, enterprise discounts, and other adjustments are not confirmed or included. Confirm against HUIT/OpenAI billing before treating any estimate as actual cost.
